name: LiPo Battery 500mAh (301230 / 501230)

dimensions.note: Dimensions vary significantly by manufacturer -- verify before PCB design

estimatedKeyboardLife.assumptions: Based on ~1mA average BLE keyboard idle draw, 4-6 hours active use per day

summary: Compact — fits small keyboards, ~2 weeks BLE life
designNotes: Good balance of size and capacity for single-half split keyboards
Fits in most split keyboard cases between PCB and bottom plate
Charge at 0.5C max (250mA) -- safe with nice!nano's 100mA charger
JST PH polarity varies by manufacturer -- ALWAYS verify with multimeter before connecting
Adafruit batteries use red=positive convention; many AliExpress batteries are reversed
Include battery protection circuit or use battery with built-in protection PCB
Store at ~3.8V (40-60% charge) for long-term storage
features: Compact form factor fits most split keyboard halves
JST PH 2-pin connector standard in keyboard builds
Safe charging rate within nice!nano's 100mA limit
1-3 weeks BLE keyboard life without LEDs
concerns: Limited capacity — only 1-3 days with LEDs enabled
JST PH polarity is NOT standardized — verify before connecting
No built-in protection on cheapest cells — confirm protection PCB included
